title: Optimizations generate code that depends on assignment location

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_before_variable_read_in_combinational_block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to a variable that appears before reading that same variable in an if condition within an always @(*) block

features.name: multiple_nonblocking_assignments_same_variable_in_always_block
features.description: Code should include multiple non-blocking assignments to the same variable at different points within an always @(*) block, with the variable being read between assignments

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_in_combinational_with_initial_block
features.description: Code should include an initial block setting a variable followed by an always @(*) block with non-blocking assignments and reads of that variable
